attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.name_of_inspector: Patricia Cabral, Diego Marcentes, Taylor Newsome
attributes.GroundsComments:
Landscaping does not meet the desired maintenance conditions. 
Active ant bed.
attributes.comments: The facility was in good condition
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: The exterior ceiling needs to be clean.   The exterior lights around the comfort station need to be cleaned. Gutter leaks at the building and the gutter system should be painted to meet desired maintenance conditions. The door to the water treatment room was unlocked. One rolling door to the bay does not open.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.RestroomComments: Two sensors on the sink faucet area not working ( one in the men’s bathroom and one in the women’s bathroom)
attributes.GroundsComments: The landscaping in the comfort area doesn’t meet desired maintenance conditions.  One dead tree.
attributes.comments: The weight station was in good condition.
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: The exterior lights around the comfort station need be cleaned.  Gutter leaks at the south end of the building and the gutter system should be painted to meet desired maintenance conditions.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.RestroomComments: The toilets need to removed stains, The shower water is not coming out evenly.
attributes.GroundsComments: One dead tree in front the building. Active bed ant.
attributes.comments: The facility was in good condition
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: Gutter leaks at the southbound of the building and the gutter system should be painted to meet desired maintenance conditions.  The exterior lights around the comfort station needs to cleaned.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: The water in the fountain has low pressure.
attributes.RoadwayComments: Symbols in a parking  area not meets desired maintenance conditions.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.InspectionBayComments: The exit door in the inspection bay is malfunctioning it cannot open from inside and needs to be pushed very hard to gets it open.
attributes.RestroomComments: The shower in the driver room not working
attributes.FamilyRestroomComments: One of the two urinals in the comfort station is not working
attributes.GroundsComments: The mowing is not being carried out properly and was pointed out during the inspection.The fence line has vines and invasive  growing on it in several locations.There have been several areas where vegetation is encroaching on to the curb for over 10 continuous feet.
attributes.comments: The facility is in good condition.The minor deficiencies were pointed out to JCS for corrective action including edging, mowing and herbicide.
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: One of the lights in the bay is not working
attributes.RoadwayComments: There is an area where the bare ground is over the minimum allowed. This is caused by police troopers, but the area needs to be maintain with grass or fillings. This was pointed out during the inspection.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.RestroomComments: One soap dispenser at men’s bathroom was empty.
attributes.GroundsComments: Junction box has a trip hazard.
attributes.comments: The weigh station was in good condition
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: Water fountain haslow pressure. The exit door in the inspection bay is malfunctioning it cannot open from inside needs to be pushed very hard to get open. Missing padlock on electrical box.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.comments: The facility is un good condition. The deficiencies were pointed out to Jorgensen to take action.
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: Generator log missing items. Portable water log not legible and difficult to understand. The exit door in the bay is malfunctioning it cannot open from inside needs to be pushed very hard to gets it open, Jorgensen was notified two months ago. Two lights out in the bay area are out. Water fountains with low water pressure.
attributes.RoadwayComments:
The symbol meets desired maintenance conditions. 
Loose screws in the junction box.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.InspectionBayComments: Fire Extinguisher no inspection signature within 30 days.
attributes.RestroomComments: The toilets need to removed stains.
attributes.comments: The facility was in good condition.
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: Gutter system showing rust, maintenance required.
attributes.RoadwayComments:
Handicap symbol peeling off. Loose screws in the electrical junction box. 
Junction boxes are missing screws and or nuts

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.InspectionBayComments: One light in the inspection pit not working.
attributes.GroundsComments: The sidewalk need edging. The bolts in the junction boxes ares losing.
attributes.comments: The facility was in good condition.
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: The lights in the comfort restroom needs to be cleaned.  Could not be inspected well water because Jorgesen did not have the key. The exit door was locked, and hard to open.
attributes.RoadwayComments: Symbol in the parking area that meets desired maintenance conditions.

attributes.name_of_weigh_station: Southbound Martin County I-95 Weigh Station
attributes.GroundsComments: The grass not mowed looks abandoned. The fence should be free of any vegetation.
attributes.comments: The facility overal appearance needs attention
attributes.Creator: Richard.Edwards@dot.state.fl.us_fdot
attributes.BuildingsComments: Two lights in the inspection pic not working. The water fountains with low pressure. Exit door not functional as originally intended. The door in the portable  water was open.
attributes.RoadwayComments: Peeling disabled symbol.  The missing and loose  bolts in the junction box.
